3. Laisa tsebe gape

panic.callSettingsNote: Ela tlhoko: TCP le Relay di ka oketsa go emela mme di isa dikgang tse di siameng. Traffic masking e tlhomela padding ya go tshameka mo dipokano tsa SDP.
panic.desc: Dikgang tsotlhe tse di leng mo node eno di tla phimolwa ruri. Tiro eno ga e kake ya boele morago.
panic.filesDestroyed: Difaele le media tsotlhe di phimotsweng
panic.enterPassword: Tsenya nomoro ya gago ya sephiri pele
panic.wrongPassword: Nomoro ya sephiri e e fosagetseng
panic.warningBody:
O tloga o senyetsa ruri tshedimosetso yotlhe.
Tiro eno ga e kake ya busediwa morago.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Metlhala yotlhe e tlositswe. Thulaganyo eno e fedile.

privacy.autoKeySync: Go haraganya selotlhoko ka go itirela
privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Fa selotlhoko se setshwa sa kamoro se amogelwa — direla didirisiwa tsotlhe tsa gago (E2E encrypted)
privacy.backupHint: Faralela diselotlhoko tsotlhe ka lentsu la sephiri mme boloka mo servereng. Fa dirisiwa di fetogile — busetsa ka polelo nngwe.
privacy.crossSignHint: Netefatsa didirisiwa tse ditshwa ka go itirela ka saene ya HMAC (tshireletso kgatlhanong le phetogo)
privacy.federatedHint: Goroganya dikgatanelo tsa polokamabaka ya go bolaediwa mo nodes ya federation (thulaganyo ya Shamir). Le fa server e latlhegile — busetsa ka peers.
privacy.historySyncHint: Poelo ya melaetsa ya go bolaediwa go leng teng mo didirisiwa tsotlhe. Server e bona seno fela
privacy.ktHint: Rekoto ya go wela fela ya diphetogo tsotlhe tsa selotlhoko sa setshaba ka morola wa hash (Merkle). Server e saena rekoto nngwe le nngwe — go tshameka go lemogwa ka nako ya tshekatsheko.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Fetisa diselotlhoko mo dirisiweng e ntshwa ka khoutu ya dinomoro di 6. Diselotlhoko di bolaeleditswe ka ECIES — server ga e kake ya bala.
privacy.ssssHint: Arola selotlhoko sa master go N dikgatanelo ka thulaganyo ya Shamir. Dikgatanelo M dife kgotsa dife di ka busetsa selotlhoko. Kgatanelo nngwe le nngwe e bolaeditswe go motho yo o tshepegisang (ECIES). Server e bona blobs di bolaeditswe fela.

keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Senotlolo sa gago sa konokono se tla kgaoganngwa ka dišere tsa N go dirisiwa sekema sa Shamir. Dikarolo dife kapa dife tsa M di tla dumella ho hlaphohelwa ha senotlolo. Kabelo e nngwe le e nngwe e encrypted bakeng sa lebitso le itseng le tshepahalang.

location.macStep1: 1. macOS: Dikgatlhegelo tsa Tsamaiso → Polokodiphiri → Ditirelo tsa Lefelo → kgontsha sebatli
location.macStep2: 2. Sebatli: tobetsa aekhone ya selotlolo mo bareng ya diaterese → Lefelo → Letla
location.otherBrowserHint: Tobetsa aekhone ya selotlolo mo bareng ya diaterese → Lefelo → Letla, o bo o laisa tsebe gape

setup.ipDetectionFailed: E paletswe ke go lemoga IP
setup.redirectCountdown: Go kaela gape mo metsotswaneng ya {metsotswana}...

ssl.skippedHttp: ⚡ SSL e tlotswe. Noutu e tla tsamaya mo godimo ga HTTP.
ssl.generatingCa: ⚡ Go tlhagisa CA le setifikeiti sa sefara...
ssl.caInstalledToStore: ✓ CA e tsentswe mo polokelong ya tshepo ya tsamaiso
ssl.caNotInstalledAuto: ⚠ CA ga e a tsenngwa ka go itirisa
ssl.certbotObtaining: ⚡ certbot: go bona setifikeiti sa {kgaolo ya dikhomphiutha}...

upload.initError: Phoso ya go simolola go laisa: HTTP {boemo}
upload.chunkFailed: Chunk {chunk} e paletswe morago ga {go leka gape} go leka gape
upload.resumeNotice: Go bonwe laiso e e sa wediwang ya faele eno.
upload.csrfNotFound: Letshwao la CSRF ga le a bonwa — tsweetswee ntšhwafatsa tsebe.

pwa.updateAvailable: Mofuta o mošwa wa VORTEX o teng

pageBuilder.dropHint: Goga difaele fano kgotsa tobetsa go tlhopha
pageBuilder.uploadAtLeastOne: Laisa bobotlana faele e le nngwe

botConstructor.title: Moagi wa Bot
botConstructor.subtitle: Aga bot ya gago ka pono — ga go tlhokege khoutu
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Molaetsa wa kamogelo fa modirisi a simolola bot...
botConstructor.scheduledMessage: Molaetsa o o tla romelwang ka nako...
botConstructor.saveAs: Boloka jaaka selo se se fetogang
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Amogelesega! Ke nna bot ya gago. Dirisa /help go bona ditaelo.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Ditaelo tse di leng teng:
/help — Bontsha molaetsa ono
botConstructor.noCommands: Ga go na ditaelo tse di rulagantsweng
botConstructor.matchValue: Boleng jo bo tshwanetseng go tshwantshanngwa...
botConstructor.randomPick: Bot e tlhopha e le nngwe ka go sa rulaganngwa
botConstructor.apiResponseTemplate: Thempoleite ya tsibogo e e nang le {tshedimosetso}...
botConstructor.notifyOnEvent: E tlhotlhelediwa fa modirisi a romela molaetsa
botConstructor.adminMessage: Molaetsa o o tla romelelwang motsamaisi...
botConstructor.docsCommand: E tsiboga fa modirisi a romela taelo e e rileng (ka sekai /help, /start). O ka tsenya dikgato tsa motlotlo go tlhama dipuisano tsa dikgato tse dintsi.
botConstructor.docsMessage: E araba fa molaetsa wa modirisi o tsamaisana le paterone. E dirisa regex — sk. "dumela|dumela" e tsamaisana le mafoko ka bobedi. Ga e tlhokomele ditlhaka tse dinnye.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Molaetsa wa ntlha badirisi ba o bona fa ba simolola bot ka /start. Bot nngwe le nngwe e tshwanetse go nna le yone.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: E romela molaetsa ka go itirisa mo thulaganyong. E siametse dikgopotso tsa letsatsi le letsatsi, di-digest tsa beke le beke, kgotsa dikitsiso tsa nako le nako.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Makala a logic ya bot. Hlahloba phetoho kapa tshebediso ya mosebedisi mme o arabe ka tsela e fapaneng ho ipapisitswe le sephetho.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot e tlhopha karabo e le nngwe ka go sa rulaganngwa mo lenaaneng. E siametse metlae, dikeletso, ditumediso, kgotsa dikarabo tse di farologaneng.
botConstructor.docsApi: E dira kopo ya HTTP go API ya kwa ntle mme e dirisa karabo mo molaetseng wa bot. Dirisa {data.field} go supa dikarolo tsa karabo.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: E romela kitsiso kwa motsamaisi wa phaposi fa e tlhotlhelediwa. E mosola mo ditsibosong, mo dikitsisong tsa modirisi yo mosha, kgotsa mo go lekanyetseng.
botConstructor.docsConversations: Dipuisano tsa Dikgato di le Ntsi
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Tsenya dikgato mo bolokong ya Taelo go tlhama dipuisano tse di dirisanang. Kgato nngwe le nngwe e botsa potso, e emela karabo ya modirisi, e bo e e boloka mo selong se se fetogang. Dirisa diphetogo mo karabong ya bofelo ka {Leinaphetogo}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Dirisa masakana a a sokologileng {mofuta} mo mokwalong wa karabo go tsenya boleng jo bo fetofetogang. Diphetogo tsa puso di tswelela go ralala melaetsa.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Diphetogo tse di ageletsweng tse di leng teng mo karabong nngwe le nngwe:
botConstructor.docsVarUserId: ID e e kgethegileng ya modirisi
botConstructor.docsVarFirstName: Leina le le bontshiwang la modirisi
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Ke nnete fa modirisi e le motsamaisi/mong
botConstructor.docsVarRoomId: ID ya phaposi ya ga jaana
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: O ka dirisa fomete e e tshwanang le HTML mo dikarabong:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Simolola ka boloko ya Kamogelo — ke selo sa ntlha se badirisi ba se bonang
botConstructor.docsTip2: Tsenya taelo ya /help e e nang le lenaane la ditaelo tsotlhe tse di leng teng
botConstructor.docsTip3: Dirisa dikgato tsa motlotlo go ikwadisa, go dira dipatlisiso, kgotsa go kokoanya tshedimosetso
botConstructor.docsTip4: Kopanya diboloko tsa Maemo le dipharologano tsa go dira dikala ka botlhale
botConstructor.docsTip5: Leka bot ya gago ka go bua le yone mo phaposing morago ga go e dirisa

gravitixDocs.title: Tshupetso ya Puo ya Gravitix
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Puo ya go kwala e e dirang sentle thata ya go aga di-bot. 96 diponagalo. Morago ga rusi.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ke puo e e rileng ya domeine (DSL) e e diretsweng go tswa kwa tshimologong go kwala di-bot tsa Vortex. Moo dipuo tse dingwe di tlhokang dilaeborari, di-callback, le boilerplate, Gravitix e go naya ditshwari tsa ditiragalo tsa maemo a ntlha, diphallo tsa motlotlo, le boemo jo bo ageletsweng — tsotlhe ka popegopuo e e phepa, e e balegang e e tlhotlheleditsweng ke Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: E a balega — khoutu e balega jaaka maikaelelo, e seng metšhini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Safe — mefuta e e sa fetogeng e tshwara diphoso pele ga nako ya go dira
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Expressive — diphallo, balebedi, le go tshwantshanya paterone di ageletswe
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Bonnye — ga go na ditlelase, ga go na boswa, ga go na matlhomeso a go ithuta
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ke ya mongwe le mongwe yo o batlang go aga bot ya Vortex ka bonako — e ka tswa e le gore ga o ise o ko o kwale khoutu pele, kgotsa o motlhabolodi yo o nang le maitemogelo yo o lapisitsweng ke boilerplate ya Python. Tshupiso eno e ruta Gravitix go tswa mo melaometheong ya ntlha: ga go tlhokege maitemogelo a pele.
gravitixDocs.howToRead: Tsela ya go buisa tshupiso eno
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Karolo nngwe le nngwe e agelela mo go tse di fetileng. Fa e le gore o sa tswa go simolola go dira diporokeramo, bala go tswa kwa godimo go ya kwa tlase. Fa e le gore o setse o itse puo e nngwe, dirisa lenaane la diteng go tlolela ka tlhamalalo kwa go se o se kgatlhegelang.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Tsela e e bonako go tswa go lefela go ya go bot e e tsamayang.
gravitixDocs.whatHappened: Go sa tswa go diragala eng?
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: on /start { ... } — e tlhalosa setshwari se se dirang fa modirisi a romela /start. emit "..." — e romela molaetsa morao ho mosebedisi. {ctx.first_name} — e tsenya leina la ntlha la modirisi mo moleng.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Mo IDE ya Gravitix, tobetsa konopo ya Run mo bareng e e kwa godimo. Tsenya Letshwao la gago la Vortex Bot fa o kopiwa. Bot e simolola ka bonako — ga go tlhokege kgato ya go aga.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Lenaneo lengwe le lengwe la Gravitix le agilwe go tswa mo dilong tse tharo tsa motheo tsa go aga: ditshwari, dipolelo tsa emit, le logic.
gravitixDocs.whatGoesAfterEmit: Ke eng se se latelang go ntsha
gravitixDocs.multipleEmits: Melaetsa e mentsi = melaetsa e mentsi
gravitixDocs.multipleHandlers: Ditshwari tse dintsi tsa setlhotlheletsi se le sengwe
gravitixDocs.explicitTypes: Ditshwaelo tsa mofuta o o tlhamaletseng
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Boleng bo bong le bo bong Gravitix bo na le mofuta. Tsamaiso ya mofuta e a fetoga: mefuta e tlholwa ka nako ya go kokoanya, pele ga bot ya gago e dira.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Badirisi ba kopanya boleng go tlhagisa boleng jo bošwa.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Dithapo mo Gravitix ke mokwalo o o tsenngwang khoutu ya UTF-8. Ba tshehetsa interpolation e ruileng le sutu ya ditshebetso tse hahilweng.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Paterone-tshwantshanya boleng kgatlhanong le dipaterone tse dintsi. Akanya ka yone jaaka polelo e e maatla ya go fetola.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Ditshebetso ke diboloko tse sebediswang hape tsa khoutu. Di go thusa gore o se ka wa boeletsa le go dira gore go nne motlhofo go tlhaloganya khoutu.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Batshwari ke pelo ya bot ya Gravitix. Motshwari mongwe le mongwe o reetsa mofuta o o rileng wa tiragalo mme o taboga fa tiragalo eo e diragala.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Balebedi ba go letla go tsenya boemo mo setshwaring. Motshwari o taboga fela fa molebedi a sekaseka go nna boammaaruri.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Selo sa ctx se teng ka go itirisa mo teng ga motshwari mongwe le mongwe. E na le tshedimosetso ka ga molaetsa wa ga jaana le modirisi yo o o rometseng.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: State e letla bot ya gago go gakologelwa dilo fa gare ga melaetsa. Kwantle ga puso, molaetsa mongwe le mongwe o ikemetse mme bot ga e na memori.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Diphallo di go letla go kwala metlotlo ya dikgato tse dintsi ka setaele sa mola, se se balegang. Kelelo e ka emisa mme ya emela molaetsa o latelang wa mosebedisi.
gravitixDocs.waitKeyword: Lefoko la botlhokwa la go leta
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Go romela melaetsa ke dipholo tsa konokono tsa bot.
gravitixDocs.emitTo: emit_to — romela go modirisi yo o rileng
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Matha khoutu ka tsela e iketsang ka kemiso — ha ho na mesebetsi ya cron, ha ho na ditshebeletso tsa kantle tse hlokehang.
gravitixDocs.everyRepeat: nngwe le nngwe — boeletsa ka kgaotso
gravitixDocs.atSpecificTime: ka — taboga ka nako e e rileng ya letsatsi
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Modirisi wa peipi |> o fetisa boleng jaaka ngangisano ya ntlha go ya kwa tirong e e latelang. E dira gore ditiro tsa go tsenya diketane di balege, go tswa molemeng go ya kwa mojeng.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix e fana ka tshebetso ya diphoso e hlophisitsweng ka diboloko tsa leka / tshwara / qetellong.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Dibopego di go letla go kgobokanya tshedimosetso e e amanang ka fa tlase ga mofuta o o bidiwang. Di-enum di tlhalosa sete e e tswetsweng ya diphetogo.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix e romela laeborari e e akaretsang ya dipalo e e nang le ditiro tsa ~180.
gravitixDocs.roundingPrecision: Go potologa le go dira dilo ka nepo
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix e na le letsoalloa rarahaneng mofuta - para ea 64-bit phaphamala emelang likarolo tsa sebele le tsa nahanang.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix e akaretsa khalekhule ya dipalo: ditswakwa le di-integral tse di balelwang mo ditirong tse di sa tlhomamang.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Alejebora ya mola ke dipalo tsa divekere le dimatheriale.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Kgopolo ya dipalo e ithuta dipharologantsho tsa dipalo tse di feletseng. Motheo wa cryptography ya segompieno.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Dipalopalo di tlamela ka didirisiwa tsa go tlhalosa, go sekaseka le go dira diphetso go tswa mo tshedimosetsong.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Ditiro tse di kgethegileng ke ditharabololo tsa ditekanyetso tsa botlhokwa tsa pharologano.
gravitixDocs.gammaRelated: Gamma le ditiro tse di amanang le yone
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Phetogo ya Fourier e bola letshwao go nna makhubu a lone a a bopang.
gravitixDocs.bp1: Ka metlha tshwara se se sa itsiweng
gravitixDocs.bp3: Dirisa dithibela boemong jwa diketane tsa fa go bona ditetlelelo
gravitixDocs.bp5: Dirisa go boela go sa le gale go fokotsa go tlhoma dintlhaga
gravitixDocs.bp6: Naya dilo maina ka tsela e e utlwalang sentle
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Tsela e e siameng ya go ithuta Gravitix ke go aga. Simolola ka bot e e bonolo ya echo, o bo o tsenya boemo, o bo o tsenya diphallo. Kgopolo nngwe le nngwe e ntšha e o e ithutang e go bulela dikgonagalo tse dingwe.
